entities.name: HARDPAN
entities.description: A soil layer with physical characteristics that limit root penetration and restrict water movement

entities.name: DOSSO REGION
entities.description: A region in Niger where hardpans are distributed

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the Dosso region is located

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: An approach used to analyze the spatial distribution of hardpans

entities.name: SOIL CRUST
entities.description: A transient soil-surface layer that is denser or more cemented than the material beneath it

entities.name: ROOT PENETRATION
entities.description: The process of roots growing into the soil, which is limited by hardpans

entities.name: WATER MOVEMENT
entities.description: The flow of water through soil, which is restricted by hardpans

entities.name: SOIL STRENGTH
entities.description: The resistance of soil to penetration, increased by the presence of a soil crust

entities.name: PENETRATION RESISTANCE
entities.description: An index used to measure soil strength
